stackConfig.negativeTags: low quality, blurry, jpeg artifacts, watermark, signature
stackConfig.defaultStyleLorasComment: Empty by design. The Spurdo identity LoRA (trained on actual Spurdo memes) already encodes the MS-Paint aesthetic — adding a separate style LoRA on top double-counts the style and constrains the model. Identity LoRA gets attached automatically from the active registry entry; that's the only LoRA we need.
stackConfig.stackChoiceComment: ACTIVATED for Spurdo. SDXL with single Spurdo identity LoRA from the registry. qualityTags removed (now in lockedPromptTemplateTags). negativeTags pruned to SDXL-specific quality issues; project-wide negatives (anti-duplication, anti-feminine, anti-photoreal) are in lockedNegativePrompt and merge with these at inference.

fluxStackConfigArchived.comment: Archived. FLUX produces polished cartoons even with style LoRAs — wrong base for MS Paint. Kept for reference; switch back if SDXL doesn't work out.

allowedProvidersComment: Bank is the canonical image source for $SPURDO and is the default for autonomous posting. Custom upload for one-off operator-curated posts. Fal kept available but flagged as experimental — may produce off-canon output. Bank-first is the right architecture for curated-meme projects: real on-canon Spurdo memes from memedepot beat any generation pipeline.
lockedPromptTemplate: sp7rdo brown bear character, single character, solo, full body shown, [SCENE]. Drawn in MS Paint style: flat solid colors, thick wobbly black outlines, simple amateur drawing, no shading, no gradients, low resolution screenshot quality, 2008 imageboard meme aesthetic. Brown rounded head with two humps and a V-crease, cream walrus-mustache muzzle, tiny black dot eyes, pink open smile. Stocky brown body with stubby arms, blob paws (not human hands). May wear casual masculine clothes (t-shirt, hoodie, jeans) when the scene calls for them.
lockedPromptTemplateTags: sp7rdo, brown bear character, single character, solo, one bear, full body, [SCENE], wearing colorful casual clothes, varied background colors, distinct color palette for clothes and environment, MS Paint style, mspaint, amateur drawing, wobbly black outlines, flat colors, no shading, simple cartoon, low resolution, screenshot aesthetic

hardExclusions: Spurdo in any Nazi/SS/extremist uniform or with extremist symbols
Spurdo with modern photo filters (bloom, HDR, teal-orange grading)
Multiple Spurdos in one image (unless explicitly a comic panel)
Text, logos, or tickers inside images
visualCanonChecklist: BROWN rounded bean-shaped head (not round teddy-bear, not anime)
Tiny black dot eyes (no white highlights, no anime sparkles)
Weird stretched face proportions — imperfect on purpose
Thick uneven black outlines, wobbly hand-drawn edges
FLAT solid colors only — no gradients, no shading, no realistic lighting
If body shown: stiff/awkward pose, oversized hands, blob feet
